headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Ralph Lauren (RL) After A 56.9% One Year Surge?
summary: If you are wondering whether Ralph Lauren shares still offer value after a strong run, this article walks through what the current price might be implying about the business. The stock last closed at US$338.36, with a 1 year return of 56.9% and a very large 3 year gain, even after a 4.5% drop over the past week and a 6.7% decline year to date. Recent headlines have focused on Ralph Lauren's brand strength, retail footprint, and positioning in higher end apparel. These factors all help frame...
